---
title: "Sadman"
format:
  html:
    theme: flatly
    css: Styles.css
    toc: false
---

::: {.hero-wrapper}

<div class="hero-text">

# Hi,
## I’m **Sadman Hayat**

### MBA Student | Finance & Investment
I am an MBA candidate at University Canada West with a background in business development and marketing. I focus on finance, strategic growth, and data-driven decision-making to help organizations create measurable impact.

[Contact Me](mailto:sadmanhayat@gmail.com){.btn-custom}


<div class="hero-buttons">
  <a href=“https://www.linkedin.com/in/sadman-hayat-578b84161/”
     target="_blank" 
     class="btn-linkedin">
     LinkedIn
  </a>

</div>


</div>

<div class="hero-image">
  <img src="Sadman.jpg" class="profile-pic">
</div>

:::

## Education
* **Master of Business Administration (MBA)** | University Canada West, Canada | 2025 – Present
* **Bachelor of Business Administration (Marketing)** | United International University, Bangladesh | 2017 – 2022

## Professional Highlights
* **Business Development Executive** | Go Global, Bangladesh | 10/2023 – 11/2024
    * Secured multiple strategic partnerships through persuasive negotiation and relationship management.
    * Increased stakeholder engagement and brand clarity by 90% through high-impact copywriting.
* **Customer Service Executive** | ShareTrip, Bangladesh | 11/2022 – 09/2023
    * Managed digital community engagement while maintaining a consistent brand voice.
    * Collaborated with marketing teams to translate customer feedback into service improvements.
* **Brand Representative** | McDonald’s & Safeway, Vancouver | 05/2025 – Present
    * Delivering service excellence and consistent brand experiences in high-traffic retail environments.

## Core Skills & Certifications
* **Skills:** Social Media Content Creation, Brand Messaging, Market Research, & Presentation Design.
* **Languages:** Bilingual in English & Bengali.
* **Certifications:** Google Fundamentals of Digital Marketing (2022) & UCW Career Launchpad (2026).
